rows.label: qev031206_MSG0001
rows.name:
Father... I'm sorry. I am going
to become this person's.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0002
rows.name:
Guh... Ugh... ...You care
for that man so much...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0003
rows.name:
He certainly isn't sturdy
like a Bias man. No... He's
weak even among Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0004
rows.name:
But he loves me more than anyone, and
he'll do reckless things just for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0005
rows.name:
Guh... You're just being
deceived... Hey, Earthling over
there? Do you trust this man?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_JNK0010
rows.name: Express Confidence

rows.label: qev031206_SEL0011
rows.name:
Declare that Leroy is a
man worthy of trust.

rows.label: qev031206_JNK0020
rows.name: Ambiguous

rows.label: qev031206_SEL0021
rows.name:
Honestly admit that he has
his unreliable moments.

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0006
rows.name:
Having someone like you say that puts
a bit of pressure on me, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0007
rows.name:
I've been running away all this time.
It can't be helped that you think that
way... But... I am going to change.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'll do anything for Lavina. If
Lavina wishes it, I don't care if
I make even Earthlings my enemies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0009
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0010
rows.name:
Thank you... Then, this horn
ring... Put it on my finger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0011
rows.name:
Father, with this, I belong to Leroy.
Not even you can tear us apart anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0012
rows.name:
...So, let's go back to NLA and talk. I
don't want things to end like this with
you, Father. That would be too lonely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0013
rows.name: Lavina... You...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0014
rows.name:
Now, let's all go home.
Father-in-law, can you stand?
If you're injured, I can...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Shut up! I won't have you
calling me father-in-law...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ahhh, dammit! I'm going to
beat what it means to be a
Bias man into you thoroughly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031206_MSG0017
rows.name: Hmph, don't dawdle! Follow me![ST:wait ]
